context_label: Curated identity context only. A resolved name does not change a disclosure's review or production status, and an unresolved name is not evidence of misconduct.

methodology.matching: Exact curated aliases after conservative punctuation, ownership-note, and disclosure-suffix normalization; otherwise one explicit known symbol token.
methodology.ticker_guard: A disclosed ticker is not accepted unless it appears as a standalone token and belongs to the curated reference table.
methodology.ticker_history: Resolved market symbols are evaluated against explicit effective-date ranges using trade_date; mappings outside a known range remain diagnostic rather than being guessed.
methodology.unresolved_policy: Ambiguous or unsupported names remain unresolved.
